nasb.text: and have him stand before Eleazar the priest and before all the congregation, and commission him in their sight.

esv.text: Make him stand before Eleazar the priest and all the congregation, and you shall commission him in their sight.

cnv.text: 叫他站在以利亞撒祭司和全體會眾面前，當他們的面委派他。

ccb.text: 让他站在以利亚撒祭司和全体会众面前，当着他们的面任命他做首领，
